examples: The team found the fossil in a rock outcrop in North Attleboro, Massachusetts.
Mr. Knecht was searching for fossils near a swamp and found a promising rock outcrop.
Bamburgh Castle, in Northumberland, which sits on a volcanic outcrop overlooking the North Sea, was in joint eighth place.
Scientists have mentioned the so-called Shaler outcrop but haven't yet spoken about it in great detail.
On the outcrop above the bridge, a low wind ruffles the grasses and fronds of ferns.
